hooks.command: git fetch origin develop 2>/dev/null && echo 'Synced with origin/develop' || echo 'Could not fetch origin/develop (offline?)'

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '/migrations/[0-9]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se pueden modificar migraciones existentes de Django."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$|credentials\.json|secrets\.'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se pueden editar archivos con secretos o credenciales."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'npm install.*(\@mui|\.@chakra|\@mantine|antd|bootstrap|react-bootstrap|\@material)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: Este proyecto usa shadcn/ui + Radix UI exclusivamente."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*(origin\s+(main|master|develop)\b|--force)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se permite push directo a branches protegidos."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP '(?<=-m ["'\'']).+?(?=["'\''](\s|$))' || echo ''); if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|refactor|docs|ci|chore|test|style|perf)(\(.+\))?!?:'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: El commit debe usar conventional commits."}}'; else exit 0; fi; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'backend/'; then ruff check --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo 'Ruff auto-fix applied' || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then if grep -qE '(useState|useEffect|useRef|useCallback|onClick|onChange|onSubmit|useContext)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! head -5 "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'use client' 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ADVERTENCIA: '"$FILE_PATH"' usa hooks/eventos de React pero NO tiene use client al inicio.'; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'backend/.*/models\.py$'; then if grep -qE '^class\s+\w+.*models\.Model\)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q 'TenantAwareModel' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ALERTA TENANT: '"$FILE_PATH"' tiene modelos que heredan de models.Model en vez de TenantAwareModel.'; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'backend/'; then ISSUES=''; if grep -nE '\.objects\.all\(\)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa|#.*tenant-safe' > /tmp/tenant_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/tenant_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo 'objects.all() sin filtro de tenant encontrado:'; cat /tmp/tenant_check)"; fi; if grep -nE '(cursor\.execute|connection\.cursor|raw\()' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa' > /tmp/raw_sql_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/raw_sql_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo 'Raw SQL detectado:'; cat /tmp/raw_sql_check)"; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "$ISSUES"; fi; rm -f /tmp/tenant_check /tmp/raw_sql_check; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/'; then if grep -nE 'dangerouslySetInnerHTML' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null > /tmp/xss_check && [ -s /tmp/xss_check ]; then echo 'ALERTA XSS: dangerouslySetInnerHTML detectado'; cat /tmp/xss_check; fi; rm -f /tmp/xss_check; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then echo 'DESIGN CHECK: Verifica shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS, mobile-first, aria labels en '"$FILE_PATH"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then echo 'DESIGN REVIEW: Verifica shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS 4, Server Component, mobile-first, accesibilidad en '"$FILE_PATH"; fi
echo 'RECORDATORIO POST-COMPACTACION: SDD activo. Branch flow: feature/* -> develop -> main. Conventional commits obligatorios.'
CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -20); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo 'Cambios pendientes detectados.'; fi
